inboundText:
SELECT "ASAdventureSmall"."Account Number" AS "Account Number"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   "t_28"."account_number_gbakc2" AS "Account Number"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      "dimaccount_t26"."accountcodealternatekey" AS "account_number_gbakc2",
      "dimaccount_t26"."accountcodealternatekey" AS "account_number_gbakc1"
   FROM
      "asadventure"."dimaccount" AS "dimaccount_t26"
   WHERE
      true
   GROUP BY
      1,
      2
) AS "t_28"

inboundText:
SELECT CAST("ASAdventureSmall"."Account Type" AS TEXT) AS "Account Type"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   CAST("dimaccount_t13"."accounttype" AS TEXT) AS "Account Type"
FROM
   "asadventure"."dimaccount" AS "dimaccount_t13"
WHERE
   true
GROUP BY
   1

inboundText:
SELECT CAST("ASAdventureSmall"."Account Type" AS TEXT) AS "Account Type",
  SUM("ASAdventureSmall"."Internet Sales Amount Local") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   "t_35"."Account Type" AS "Account Type",
   MIN("t_35"."sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      MIN("t_29"."sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok",
      "t_34"."Account Type" AS "Account Type"
   FROM
   (
      SELECT
         CAST(SUM(CAST("factinternetsales_t27".salesamount AS DECIMAL(38,9))) AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
      FROM
         "asadventure"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t27"
      WHERE
         true
   ) AS "t_29"
   CROSS JOIN
   (
      SELECT
         CAST("dimaccount_t31"."accounttype" AS TEXT) AS "Account Type"
      FROM
         "asadventure"."dimaccount" AS "dimaccount_t31"
      WHERE
         true
      GROUP BY
         1
   ) AS "t_34"
   GROUP BY
      2
) AS "t_35"
GROUP BY
   1

inboundText:
SELECT CAST("ASAdventureSmall"."Business Type" AS TEXT) AS "Business Type",
  SUM("ASAdventureSmall"."Internet Sales Amount Local") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   "t_35"."Business Type" AS "Business Type",
   MIN("t_35"."sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      MIN("t_29"."sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok",
      "t_34"."Business Type" AS "Business Type"
   FROM
   (
      SELECT
         CAST(SUM(CAST("factinternetsales_t27".salesamount AS DECIMAL(38,9))) AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
      FROM
         "asadventure"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t27"
      WHERE
         true
   ) AS "t_29"
   CROSS JOIN
   (
      SELECT
         CAST("dimreseller_t31"."businesstype" AS TEXT) AS "Business Type"
      FROM
         "asadventure"."dimreseller" AS "dimreseller_t31"
      WHERE
         true
      GROUP BY
         1
   ) AS "t_34"
   GROUP BY
      2
) AS "t_35"
GROUP BY
   1

inboundText:
SELECT CAST("ASAdventureSmall"."Business Type" AS TEXT) AS "Business Type",
  SUM("ASAdventureSmall"."Reseller Sales Amount Local") AS "sum:Reseller Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
GROUP BY 1
outboundText:
SELECT
   CAST("t_29"."businesstype_c28" AS TEXT) AS "Business Type",
   CAST(SUM("factresellersales_t25"."salesamount") AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS "sum:Reseller Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM
   "asadventure"."factresellersales" AS "factresellersales_t25"
JOIN
(
   SELECT
      "dimreseller_t26"."businesstype" AS "businesstype_c28",
      "dimreseller_t26"."resellerkey" AS "resellerkey_c27"
   FROM
      "asadventure"."dimreseller" AS "dimreseller_t26"
   WHERE
      true
   GROUP BY
      1,
      2
) AS "t_29"
ON
   "factresellersales_t25"."resellerkey" = "t_29"."resellerkey_c27"
WHERE
   true
GROUP BY
   1

inboundText:
SELECT SUM("ASAdventureSmall"."Internet Sales Amount Local") AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM "AdventureWorksDW2012Multidimensional-EE"."ASAdventureSmall" "ASAdventureSmall"
HAVING (COUNT(1) > 0)
outboundText:
SELECT
   CAST(SUM(CAST("factinternetsales_t13".salesamount AS DECIMAL(38,9))) AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS "sum:Internet Sales Amount Local:ok"
FROM
   "asadventure"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t13"
WHERE
   true
